inputs.label: Sitting Height (cm)
inputs.businessContext: Sitting height measured in centimeters from the seating surface to the vertex of the head.

inputs.label: Sitting Height (mm)
inputs.businessContext: Sitting height measured in millimeters. Will be converted to cm by dividing by 10.

inputs.label: Standing Height (cm)
inputs.businessContext: Standing height measured in centimeters from floor to vertex.

inputs.label: Standing Height (mm)
inputs.businessContext: Standing height measured in millimeters. Will be converted to cm by dividing by 10.
